name: SysWarden
description: SysWarden (github.com/duggytuxy/syswarden, syswarden.io) — an open-source, enterprise-grade Host Intrusion Detection & Prevention System / security orchestrator for critical Linux infrastructure: hardware-level network filtering (L2-L4 via nftables/pf), OWASP ModSecurity WAF (L7), WireGuard SSH/admin cloaking and automated CIS Level 2 hardening. This connector parses a SysWarden status/report export (JSON) and maps it to the XORCISM model: the protected host -> ASSET (with hardening posture), each not-applied CIS hardening control or disabled defensive component -> a finding, and each source IP blocked by nftables/ModSecurity -> a threat-intel IOC. Worker-safe: parses an exported file, no live host access.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A SysWarden status/report export in JSON (e.g. `syswarden --status --json > status.json`). If omitted, the SYSWARDEN_STATUS env path (worker) is read.

parameters.name: min_severity
parameters.help: Only emit hardening findings at or above this severity (low|medium|high). Default: low (all).
